description: Claude Code usage analytics: tracks cost, token consumption, API requests, tool usage, sessions, active coding time, lines of code, commits, code edit acceptance rate, per-user breakdown, and error details. Data sourced from Application Insights via OpenTelemetry.

panels.description: Total cost in USD across all models

azureLogAnalytics.query:
customMetrics
| where customDimensions["service.name"] == "claude-code"
| where name == "claude_code.cost.usage"
| project timestamp, cost = value

panels.title: Total Cost

azureLogAnalytics.query:
customMetrics
| where customDimensions["service.name"] == "claude-code"
| where name == "claude_code.session.count"
| project timestamp, sessions = value

traces
| where customDimensions["service.name"] == "claude-code"
| where customDimensions["event.name"] == "user_prompt"
| summarize count() by bin(timestamp, 1d)
| order by timestamp asc

traces
| where customDimensions["service.name"] == "claude-code"
| where customDimensions["event.name"] == "api_request"
| summarize count() by bin(timestamp, 1d)
| order by timestamp asc

traces
| where customDimensions["service.name"] == "claude-code"
| where customDimensions["event.name"] == "api_error"
| summarize count() by bin(timestamp, 1d)
| order by timestamp asc

panels.description: Total active coding time in hours

azureLogAnalytics.query:
customMetrics
| where customDimensions["service.name"] == "claude-code"
| where name == "claude_code.active_time.total"
| project timestamp, activeHours = value / 3600.0

panels.title: Active Time

azureLogAnalytics.query:
customMetrics
| where customDimensions["service.name"] == "claude-code"
| where name == "claude_code.cost.usage"
| extend model = tostring(customDimensions["model"])
| summarize cost = sum(value) by bin(timestamp, 1d), model
| order by timestamp asc

panels.description: Daily token usage by type (input, output, cacheRead, cacheCreation)

azureLogAnalytics.query:
customMetrics
| where customDimensions["service.name"] == "claude-code"
| where name == "claude_code.token.usage"
| extend tokenType = tostring(customDimensions["type"])
| summarize totalTokens = sum(value) by bin(timestamp, 1d), tokenType
| order by timestamp asc

panels.title: Daily Token Usage by Type

azureLogAnalytics.query:
customMetrics
| where customDimensions["service.name"] == "claude-code"
| where name == "claude_code.token.usage"
| extend model = tostring(customDimensions["model"])
| summarize totalTokens = sum(value) by bin(timestamp, 1d), model
| order by timestamp asc

customMetrics
| where customDimensions["service.name"] == "claude-code"
| where name == "claude_code.cost.usage"
| extend model = tostring(customDimensions["model"])
| summarize cost = sum(value) by bin(timestamp, 1d), model
| order by timestamp asc

traces
| where customDimensions["service.name"] == "claude-code"
| where customDimensions["event.name"] == "api_request"
| extend model = tostring(customDimensions["model"])
| summarize count() by bin(timestamp, 1d), model
| order by timestamp asc

traces
| where customDimensions["service.name"] == "claude-code"
| where customDimensions["event.name"] == "tool_decision"
| extend toolName = tostring(customDimensions["tool_name"])
| summarize count() by bin(timestamp, 1d), toolName
| order by timestamp asc

panels.description: Daily tool invocations stacked by tool name

azureLogAnalytics.query:
traces
| where customDimensions["service.name"] == "claude-code"
| where customDimensions["event.name"] == "tool_decision"
| extend toolName = tostring(customDimensions["tool_name"])
| summarize count() by bin(timestamp, 1d), toolName
| order by timestamp asc

panels.title: Daily Tool Usage (Stacked)

panels.description: Lines of code added vs removed per day

azureLogAnalytics.query:
customMetrics
| where customDimensions["service.name"] == "claude-code"
| where name == "claude_code.lines_of_code.count"
| extend changeType = tostring(customDimensions["type"])
| summarize lines = sum(value) by bin(timestamp, 1d), changeType
| order by timestamp asc

panels.title: Lines of Code (Added vs Removed)

panels.description: Number of git commits per day

azureLogAnalytics.query:
customMetrics
| where customDimensions["service.name"] == "claude-code"
| where name == "claude_code.commit.count"
| summarize commits = sum(value) by bin(timestamp, 1d)
| order by timestamp asc

panels.title: Daily Commits

panels.description: Number of user prompts per day

azureLogAnalytics.query:
traces
| where customDimensions["service.name"] == "claude-code"
| where customDimensions["event.name"] == "user_prompt"
| summarize prompts = count() by bin(timestamp, 1d)
| order by timestamp asc

panels.title: Daily User Prompts

azureLogAnalytics.query:
customMetrics
| where customDimensions["service.name"] == "claude-code"
| where name == "claude_code.session.count"
| summarize sessions = sum(value) by bin(timestamp, 1d)
| order by timestamp asc

panels.description: Active coding time per day in hours

azureLogAnalytics.query:
customMetrics
| where customDimensions["service.name"] == "claude-code"
| where name == "claude_code.active_time.total"
| summarize activeHrs = sum(value) / 3600.0 by bin(timestamp, 1d)
| order by timestamp asc

panels.title: Active Time per Day

azureLogAnalytics.query:
customMetrics
| where customDimensions["service.name"] == "claude-code"
| where name == "claude_code.code_edit_tool.decision"
| extend decision = tostring(customDimensions["decision"])
| summarize accepted = countif(decision == "accept"), total = count()
| project timestamp = now(), acceptRate = round(todouble(accepted) / todouble(total) * 100.0, 1)

panels.description: Summary of each user's activity including sessions, prompts, tool calls, cost, tokens, active time, and lines of code

azureLogAnalytics.query:
let tool_usage = traces
| where customDimensions["service.name"] == "claude-code"
| where customDimensions["event.name"] == "tool_decision"
| summarize totalToolCalls = count() by userEmail = tostring(customDimensions["user.email"]);
let prompts = traces
| where customDimensions["service.name"] == "claude-code"
| where customDimensions["event.name"] == "user_prompt"
| summarize totalPrompts = count() by userEmail = tostring(customDimensions["user.email"]);
let api_reqs = traces
| where customDimensions["service.name"] == "claude-code"
| where customDimensions["event.name"] == "api_request"
| summarize totalApiRequests = count() by userEmail = tostring(customDimensions["user.email"]);
let api_errs = traces
| where customDimensions["service.name"] == "claude-code"
| where customDimensions["event.name"] == "api_error"
| summarize totalApiErrors = count() by userEmail = tostring(customDimensions["user.email"]);
let costs = customMetrics
| where customDimensions["service.name"] == "claude-code"
| where name == "claude_code.cost.usage"
| summarize totalCost = sum(value) by userEmail = tostring(customDimensions["user.email"]);
let tokens = customMetrics
| where customDimensions["service.name"] == "claude-code"
| where name == "claude_code.token.usage"
| summarize totalTokens = sum(value) by userEmail = tostring(customDimensions["user.email"]);
let active_time = customMetrics
| where customDimensions["service.name"] == "claude-code"
| where name == "claude_code.active_time.total"
| summarize totalActiveTimeSec = sum(value) by userEmail = tostring(customDimensions["user.email"]);
let sessions = customMetrics
| where customDimensions["service.name"] == "claude-code"
| where name == "claude_code.session.count"
| summarize totalSessions = sum(value) by userEmail = tostring(customDimensions["user.email"]);
let loc = customMetrics
| where customDimensions["service.name"] == "claude-code"
| where name == "claude_code.lines_of_code.count"
| extend changeType = tostring(customDimensions["type"])
| summarize linesAdded = sumif(value, changeType == "added"), linesRemoved = sumif(value, changeType == "removed") by userEmail = tostring(customDimensions["user.email"]);
tool_usage
| join kind=leftouter prompts on userEmail
| join kind=leftouter api_reqs on userEmail
| join kind=leftouter api_errs on userEmail
| join kind=leftouter costs on userEmail
| join kind=leftouter tokens on userEmail
| join kind=leftouter active_time on userEmail
| join kind=leftouter sessions on userEmail
| join kind=leftouter loc on userEmail
| project User=userEmail, Sessions=totalSessions, Prompts=totalPrompts, ToolCalls=totalToolCalls, ApiRequests=totalApiRequests, ApiErrors=totalApiErrors, Cost=round(totalCost,2), Tokens=totalTokens, ActiveHrs=round(totalActiveTimeSec/3600.0,2), LinesAdded=linesAdded, LinesRemoved=linesRemoved

panels.title: User Summary

panels.description: Cost breakdown by user and model

azureLogAnalytics.query:
customMetrics
| where customDimensions["service.name"] == "claude-code"
| where name == "claude_code.cost.usage"
| extend userEmail = tostring(customDimensions["user.email"]),
         model = tostring(customDimensions["model"])
| summarize cost = round(sum(value), 2) by userEmail, model
| order by userEmail asc, cost desc

panels.title: Per-User Cost by Model

azureLogAnalytics.query:
traces
| where customDimensions["service.name"] == "claude-code"
| where customDimensions["event.name"] == "api_error"
| summarize errors = count() by bin(timestamp, 1h)
| order by timestamp asc

traces
| where customDimensions["service.name"] == "claude-code"
| where customDimensions["event.name"] == "api_error"
| extend error = tostring(customDimensions["error"]),
         model = tostring(customDimensions["model"]),
         duration_ms = tostring(customDimensions["duration_ms"]),
         status_code = tostring(customDimensions["status_code"]),
         userEmail = tostring(customDimensions["user.email"])
| project timestamp, userEmail, model, error, duration_ms, status_code
| order by timestamp desc

title: Claude Code
